io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io

Class PacROMSetImporter

  • java.lang.Object
    • io.github.thatgarlicdude.pacio.io.PacROMSetImporter

  • public final class PacROMSetImporter
extends java.lang.Object
    A class used to import the Pac-Man ROM set ZIP files to PacROMSet objects, which represent as digital, unified ROM sets in memory.

    The main method of this class is the importROMSet method, which is used to turn existing Pac-Man ROM set ZIP files from disk into unified ROM sets to memory.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PacROMSetImporter(java.lang.String path)
      Constructs an instance of the ROM set importer.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      PacROMSet importROMSet()
      Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file from disk to a PacROMSet object to memory, which are unified ROM sets.

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PacROMSetImporter

        public PacROMSetImporter(java.lang.String path)
        Constructs an instance of the ROM set importer.
        Parameters:
        path - The file path to the unified ROM set.

    • Method Detail

      • importROMSet

        public final PacROMSet importROMSet()
                             throws java.io.IOException
        Imports an existing Pac-Man ROM set ZIP file from disk to a PacROMSet object to memory, which are unified ROM sets.
        Returns:
        A unified ROM set built off of the existing ROM set ZIP file.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - When accessing the ZIP file fails.
